typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Project_id as string,
		function_code as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string,
		class_name_hours as string,
		class_name_quantity as string,
		sub_class_hours as string,
		sub_class_qty as string,
		sub_class_plan as string,
		unit_of_measure_hours as string,
		unit_of_measure_qty as string,
		pim_code as string,
		roc_code as string,
		ROC_Step as string,
		Phase_Code as string,
		WorkArea_Code as string,
		WorkUnit_Code as string,
		ScheduleResource_Code as string,
		cwp_code as string,
		Activity as string,
		iwp_Code as string,
		Contract as string,
		CostCode as string,
		costcode_desription as string,
		CostType as string,
		CostingCOA as string,
		Description as string,
		budget_date as string,
		DrawingNo as string,
		TagNo as string,
		Spool as string,
		Line as string,
		spec as string,
		System as string,
		PieceMark as string,
		NumberOfPieces as string,
		Subsystem as string,
		text5 as string,
		Level6 as string,
		PlannedStatus as string,
		ProgressStatus as string,
		budgethours as string,
		BudgetQuantity as string,
		PlannedHours as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Sitepro/SiteproBudget/Sitepro_Budget.csv']) ~> sourceSiteproBudgetStage
sourceSiteproBudgetStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/SiteproBudget/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'Sitepro_Budget_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkTimesheetSiteproRaw
